title: 100% Recycled Eco Baby Rattles and Comforter Blankets (Twinkle Unicorn 14cm Stick Rattle)
features: Choose from the a wide range of baby rattles in the designs of a Monkey, Elephant, Giraffe, Koala or a Unicorn!
Beautiful Eco Baby Themed Gift Range: better for our life, environment and sustainability
These toys are manufactured and stuffed with rPET polyester made from 100% recycled plastic waste.
Our process gives plastic a second life and uses up to 59 percent less energy to produce than virgin polyester.
description: Product Description Deluxe Paws bring you Keel Toys' 100% Recycled Baby Range! 100% Recycled 100% Huggable Eco Baby Themed Blankets, Rattles, Plush Soft Toys and more! Perfect baby shower gifts Choose from the a wide range of baby rattles, comforter security blankets and cuddly plush toys in the designs of a Monkey, Elephant, Giraffe, Koala or a Unicorn! Cozy Koala Huggy Giraffe Ezra Elephant Marcel Monkey These sustainable toys are manufactured and stuffed with 100 percent recycled polyester from plastic waste. Weighted with recycled glass beans, these floppy toys have been perfectly designed for hugging by a loving new friend. Traditional glass eyes have been replaced with cotton embroidered eyes, which give a unique and playful character to these eco soft toys. Features: Beautiful Eco Baby Themed Gift Range: better for our life, environment and sustainability Recycled: These toys are manufactured and stuffed with rPET polyester made from 100% recycled plastic waste. Approximately 10 water bottles makes a 18cm toy, 14 bottles 25cm toy and 16 bottles a 30cm toy. Sustainable: The Keeleco process gives plastic a second life and uses up to 59 percent less energy to produce than virgin polyester. Design & Safety: UK Design, Toy authenticated by the iconic Keel Toys FSC card disc. British safety standard BS EN 71 & European safety standard EN71 hand washable.
